--- Makefile    (revision 367876)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      bacula

-PORTREVISION?= 1

 MASTER_SITES=  SF/bacula/bacula/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX?=        #
